log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:10+3=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:1+7=8 vs DC 11] FAIL! 2 radiant damage. HP: 57/59
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:6+7=13 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):6+1=7 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Target is flying. Hold Person to paralyze → they fall!
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:10+3=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 11 WIS save on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 11] FAIL!
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: No valid targets or actions. Dodging.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
══ ROUND 2 ══
⚠ FALLING! Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank crashes to the ground!
→ Falling damage: 2d6 = 10 bludgeoning. HP: 49/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 49/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [paralyzed, prone] | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 11] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
